consumer_electronics.title: The best July 4th sales we found so far

consumer_electronics.title: The video game disc is dead
consumer_electronics.summary: For decades, to be a gamer was to accumulate a lot of stuff. channel_news.title: Marketing has a measurement problem that most brands are ignoring
channel_news.summary: Traditional last-touch and platform-reported models were built for a simpler era. This measurement framework systematically rewards proximity to the checkout over actual influence on the decision. Sponsored by Measured.

channel_news.title: Marketplace Briefing: How a cartoon frog wizard is helping Clorox sell Pine-Sol on TikTok Shop
channel_news.summary: Clorox is using TikTok Shop to test products, reach Gen Z and drive sales. The universe of characters it has created for its cleaning brand, Pine-Sol offers perhaps the best example of the company's approach to TikTok Shop.

channel_news.title: Why Amy’s Kitchen is championing a new certification for non-ultra-processed foods
channel_news.summary: In an interview with Modern Retail, Amy’s Kitchen CEO Paul Schiefer explains how a new Non-UPF Verified certification aims to clarify food processing standards. Here's what it requires.

channel_news.title: Kroger is back in growth mode with Giant Eagle acquisition
channel_news.summary: On Wednesday, Kroger announced that it would buy Giant Eagle for just under $1.7 billion, a signal of the grocer's urgency to boost its footprint. The deal will expand Kroger's reach and abilities beyond just growing the store count.

channel_news.title: Prime Day results suggest shoppers are saving splurges for Black Friday
channel_news.summary: Amazon's Prime Day sale looked a little more like a Costco run this year, as shoppers stocked up on essentials. Here's what shopper behavior during the event could mean for Black Friday this year.

channel_news.title: Bogg, on track for record sales, expands into Urban Outfitters and Anthropologie
channel_news.summary: Bogg, known for its colorful and washable Croc-like totes, is entering new retailers like Urban Outfitters and Anthropologie, as sales are on track to surpass last year's revenue high of $140 million.

channel_news.title: Nuna, a favorite among millennial parents, opens a new showroom that will double as a content hub
channel_news.summary: Nuna's new flagship is the latest example of how brands are using stores as more than a point of sale. The baby gear brand, known for its car seats, is opening a new showroom that will double as a content hub.

channel_news.title: Nike says it expects $986 million in IEEPA tariff refunds
channel_news.summary: Nike says it's in a better financial position as it awaits nearly $1 billion in refunds related to IEEPA tariffs.

channel_news.title: Brands Briefing: Measurement is the next frontier in GEO for brands
channel_news.summary: Measuring how often your company gets recommended by AI engines — and, subsequently, how often those recommendations lead to website visits and sales — is starting to become a bigger topic of discussion for brand executives.

channel_news.title: Electronics prices are starting to soar, adding to the stress consumers are facing
channel_news.summary: Major electronics companies like Apple and Microsoft announced significant price hikes this month, largely driven by the increased cost of memory chips. It will leave consumers feeling even more squeezed.

channel_news.title: StockX expands with debut of used, vintage listings
channel_news.summary: StockX Listings uses AI photo analysis and pricing guidance so sellers can list products quickly.
